questions.executed_mdx_query:
WITH 
MEMBER [Measures].[Combined Gross Profit] AS 
    ([Measures].[Internet Gross Profit] + [Measures].[Reseller Gross Profit])
MEMBER [Measures].[Combined Sales Amount] AS 
    ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] + [Measures].[Reseller Sales Amount])
MEMBER [Measures].[Combined Gross Margin] AS 
    IIF([Measures].[Combined Sales Amount] = 0, NULL,
        ([Measures].[Combined Gross Profit] / [Measures].[Combined Sales Amount])
    ), FORMAT_STRING = "Percent"
SELECT 
    {[Measures].[Combined Gross Margin]} ON COLUMNS
FROM [Adventure Works]
